name: Light The Lamp Hockey
short_description: Old School Hockey Gaming in a Beer League coat of paint! Welcome to the most dynamic 8-ish bit hockey experience you could have ever asked for. Built on simplicity and full of depth, Earn Points and Challenge for the Cup!
detailed_description:
Old School Hockey Gaming in a Beer league coat of paint! Welcome to the most dynamic 8-ish bit hockey experience you could have ever asked for.
Built on simplicity and full of depth, Earn points with your team and challenge for the CUP!

FEATURES


Dynamic Arcade Hockey with an Adult Rec League Theme!
Crazy bounces, Questionable Calls! All the ebbs and flows of real Hockey!
And most importantly, it's fun to play!

DYNAMIC GAMEPLAY

Each game tells a different story,
Defensive battles, Scorefests, A Feisty Chippy game. You never know!

EASY TO PLAY!

Simple 2 button game play, Much like the 8 bit games of old.

Elite Checking System!

Play a rough game with the AI and they will play rough right back!

League Mode

Cultivate the Ultimate Beer League Team and Quest for a Championship!

Mod Mode

Create your own Hockey Universe with Mod Mode! Change the Music, the PA, and
import any team with the Team Editor! The Ultimate Arcade Hockey Sandbox!
